hero.title: Turn Negative Reviews Into Loyal Customers
hero.subtitle: The AI assistant that helps restaurant owners respond to customer reviews professionally, empathetically, and in one click.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Simple and powerful tools to manage your online reputation.

sentiment.title: Sentiment Detection
sentiment.description: AI automatically analyzes each review to identify the tone — positive, neutral, or negative — and prioritizes urgent responses.

response.title: AI-Generated Responses
response.description: Get professional, empathetic responses in seconds, tailored to the specific context of each review.

copy.title: One-Click Copy & Send
copy.description: Copy the generated response and paste it directly on Google, TripAdvisor, or any other review platform.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to respond like a pro.

step1.title: Paste the Review
step1.description: Copy the customer review from Google, TripAdvisor, or another platform and paste it into our tool.

step2.title: AI Analyzes & Writes
step2.description: Our AI detects sentiment and generates a professional response tailored to the context.

step3.title: Copy & Publish
step3.description: Copy the response in one click and publish it on the review platform of your choice.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade to Pro or Business when you're ready.

footer.description: The AI assistant for restaurant owners. Respond to customer reviews in seconds.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyDescription: Paste your first customer review to generate a professional response.

restaurants.title: My Restaurants
restaurants.subtitle: Manage your restaurants and sync Google reviews.
restaurants.addNewSubtitle: Search on Google Maps or add manually.
restaurants.alreadyLinked: This restaurant is already linked to your account.
restaurants.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this restaurant and all its reviews?
restaurants.empty: No restaurants. Add your first restaurant to get started.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Visualize your review trends over the last 12 weeks.
analytics.noData: Not enough data yet. Add reviews to see your analytics.

meta.title: ReviewReply — AI-Powered Restaurant Review Responses
meta.description: The AI assistant that helps restaurant owners respond to customer reviews professionally and empathetically.
meta.ogTitle: ReviewReply — Turn Reviews Into Loyal Customers
meta.ogDescription: Analyze sentiment, generate professional responses, and manage your online reputation with AI.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.missingFields: Please fill in all required fields

trends.title: Trends Analysis
trends.subtitle: Search your restaurant on Google or import reviews manually to identify recurring issues.

search.label: Search for your restaurant
search.notEnoughReviews: Not enough reviews found for analysis (minimum 3).

progress.fetchingHint: We're going through all review pages for this restaurant.
progress.analyzingHint: AI is identifying trends and preparing suggestions.

form.bulkPlaceholder:
Paste all your customer reviews here, separated by a blank line...

Example:

The service was very slow, we waited 45 minutes for our dishes.

Excellent restaurant, the food was delicious and the staff very welcoming.

Noisy atmosphere and lukewarm dishes, disappointing for the price.
form.bulkHint: Separate each review with a blank line. Minimum 3 reviews required.
form.individualLabel: Add your reviews one by one
form.reviewCount: {count, plural, =0 {No reviews detected} =1 {1 review detected} other {# reviews detected}}

results.reviewsAnalyzed: {count, plural, =1 {1 review analyzed} other {# reviews analyzed}}
